attacking_style: Attacks on final climbs from breakaway scenarios, bridging between groups before launching moves that force counter-attacks. Operates from reduced peloton or break rather than GC group.
team_tactics: Relies on individual positioning and bonus seconds strategy from early breakaways rather than sustained team support. Opportunistic rather than team-controlled setups.
terrain_preference: Medium mountain stages and breakaway-friendly parcours where bonus seconds can be accumulated. Vulnerable on pure summit finishes against specialist climbers.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain pace against pure climbers on summit finishes when GC acceleration begins. Red jersey defense collapsed before summit proper, indicating climbing threshold limitations.
key_patterns: Bonus seconds from breakaways critical to GC positioning (2-second margin maintained red jersey)
Bridging attacks between groups on climbs, often catalyzing winning moves by others
GC ambitions limited by inability to match climber acceleration on sustained ascents
form_trajectory: negative: 2019 Vuelta showed GC defense unsustainable against climbers despite early race success
